title: Fictional Dessert Product Macro Ad AI
sourceTitle: Fictional Dessert Product Macro Ad AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: partially bitten fictional layered wafer dessert on a ceramic plate, crumbs and used fork nearby. Scene / Context: softly blurred high-end restaurant table with tiny fictional logo and slogan at top. Source Recipe Translation: fictional dessert product macro ad. Preserve these source mechanics: high-end restaurant macro product photography, realistic crumbs, shallow depth, soft blurred premium background. Concrete social variant uses partially bitten fictional layered wafer dessert on a ceramic plate, crumbs and used fork nearby in softly blurred high-end restaurant table with tiny fictional logo and slogan at top. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: high-end restaurant macro product photography, realistic crumbs, shallow depth, soft blurred premium background; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: LUMA BITE / layered cocoa wafer; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: fictional dessert product macro ad. Hero Subject: partially bitten fictional pistachio wafer dessert on a ceramic plate, revealing layered cream and crisp cake crumbs. Scene or Context: macro tabletop ad with soft studio shadow, tiny crumbs, pistachio-green filling and premium cafe packaging blurred behind. Composition: vertical 4:5 product macro poster, bitten cross-section large and sharp, clean top negative space for product name; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: realistic dessert macro advertising, shallow depth of field, tactile crumb detail, warm premium commercial lighting; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: PISTA WAFER / LAYERED CRUNCH; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: fictional dessert brand, no real logo, no trademarked packaging, no messy crumbs covering focal point, no watermark; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
